title: Minimum Essential Standards, Assessment and Rating for Undergraduate Unani Colleges and Attached Teaching Hospitals Regulations, 2023
notes: Thresholds transcribed from MESAR (UG) Unani 2023 (markdown/MESAR_UG_Unani.md): Table-1 (land), Table-2 (constructed area), Table-3/4 (library, digital), Table-5 (clinical skill), Table-6 (OPD), Table-7/8 (IPD beds, occupancy). The source markdown abbreviates Schedules II-XXIII, so the teaching/non-teaching/hospital faculty cadre schedules are not machine-transcribed here; those rules reuse the Ayurveda staff-table/roster mechanism and depend on parameters the current extractors do not yet emit for Unani reports (documented extraction gap). Punitive policy is the ASU-wide board policy (2026-27), shared with Ayurveda.
